calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Of Entire Action Pursuant To Rule 3.770 [No Hearing Required 3.770(B)]
Off Calendar Mar-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Waverly Latourette's Motion For Dismissal Of Entire Action (Class Action) Pursuant To Rule 3.770 is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing and consistent with California Rules of Court, rule 3.770, the court orders Plaintiff may dismiss the individual and class claims without prejudice. The record demonstrates that dismissal will not prejudice class members, thus no notice to the class is required.

Plaintiff must file a request for dismissal on the Judicial Council form and should include a copy of this order with that submission.

Plaintiff is ordered to prepare a proposed order consistent with the above and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
